messages.content: list the 25 best jazz pianists like chick corea and keith jarret

Here is a list of 25 influential jazz pianists, including Chick Corea and Keith Jarrett, in no particular order:

1. Herbie Hancock
2. Bill Evans
3. Oscar Peterson
4. Thelonious Monk
5. McCoy Tyner
6. Art Tatum
7. Bud Powell
8. Ahmad Jamal
9. Cecil Taylor
10. Horace Silver
11. Wynton Kelly
12. Tommy Flanagan
13. Mary Lou Williams
14. Esbjörn Svensson
15. Toshiko Akiyoshi
16. Phineas Newborn Jr.
17. Cecil Taylor
18. Brad Mehldau
19. Marcus Roberts
20. Paul Bley
21. Michel Petrucciani
22. Lennie Tristano
23. Andrew Hill
24. Jason Moran
25. Fred Hersch

These musicians have made significant contributions to the genre and have left a lasting impact on jazz piano.
